requirements.notes: Pressure rating should exceed max simulated tank pressure with margin.

candidates.productName: Stainless Steel 1-Piece 40 Series Ball Valve, 12 Cv, 1/2 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting, SC-11
candidates.notes: Cleaning Process: Special Cleaning and Packaging (SC-11). Body Material: 316 Stainless Steel. Ball/Stem Material: Stainless Steel. Packing Material: PTFE. Lubricant: Nonhydrocarbon lubricants. Ring/Disc Material: PTFE-Coated Stainless Steel. Room Temperature Pressure Rating: 2500 PSIG @ 100°F / 172 BAR @ 37°C (converted: ~17,236,893 Pa). Connection: 1/2 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting both ends. Flow Pattern: 2-Way, Shutoff, Straight. Orifice: 0.406 in / 10.3 mm. Low Emissions Certified: Yes. Service Class: General. The page does not explicitly state oxygen-clean or cryogenic compatibility; SC-11 denotes Special Cleaning and Packaging but oxygen-clean designation is not explicitly confirmed on this page.

candidates.productName: Stainless Steel Integral Bonnet Needle Valve, 0.37 Cv, 6 mm Swagelok Tube Fitting, Regulating Stem, SC-11 Cleaned
candidates.notes: 316 Stainless Steel body. Cleaning Process: Special Cleaning and Packaging (SC-11) per ASTM G93 Level C. Max pressure rating: 3130 PSIG @ 600°F / 215 BAR @ 315°C (converted 3130 PSIG ≈ 21,582,670 Pa). Min temperature: -65°F (-53°C). Max temperature: 600°F (315°C). SC-11 cleaning is explicitly listed; oxygen compatibility is implied by SC-11 (ASTM G93 Level C oxygen cleaning) but the page does not explicitly state 'oxygen compatible' — marked true based on SC-11 designation. Cryogenic compatibility not stated; minimum temp is -53°C, not cryogenic range. Price requires login. Flow pattern: 2-Way, Shutoff, Straight. Needle/metering valve, not a shutoff ball valve — may not meet LOX feed valve duty requirements.

candidates.productName: Stainless Steel Integral Bonnet Needle Valve, 0.37 Cv, 1/4 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting, Regulating Stem, SC-11 Cleaned
candidates.notes: Body: 316 Stainless Steel. Cleaning Process: Special Cleaning and Packaging (SC-11) — compliant with ASTM G93 Level C, suitable for oxygen service. Max pressure rating: 3130 PSIG (21,582,655 Pa) at 600°F / 215 BAR at 315°C. Temperature range: -65°F (-53°C) to 450°F (232°C). Connection: 1/4 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting both ends. Regulating stem. Phenolic knob handle. Low Emissions Certified. Price requires login. Note: pressure rating of ~21.6 MPa exceeds the 2 MPa requirement. Cv of 0.37 is relatively low — LOX feed valve suitability depends on flow area calculation.

candidates.productName: Stainless Steel Integral Bonnet Needle Valve, 0.73 Cv, 1/2 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting, Regulating Stem, SC-11
candidates.notes: 316 Stainless Steel body. Cleaning Process: Special Cleaning and Packaging (SC-11) per ASTM G93 Level C — suitable for oxygen service. Connections: 1/2 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting (both ends). Max temp: 600°F (315°C), Min temp: -65°F (-53°C). Catalog lists working pressures up to 6000 psig (413 bar) for this series. Price requires login.
